title: Declutterer
description:
Declutterer is a stress-free, soothing tidying and cleaning simulation game. Immerse yourself in sorting, sweeping and arranging spaces, and unwind completely as you restore order at a gentle pace.

The game centers around item storage and deep cleaning. There are no time limits or penalties of any kind. It’s easy to pick up, letting you fully soak in the calming joy of tidying. 

Meticulous Storage & OrganizingSort and place every tiny item neatly in its spot.

 Organize all the cluttered items scattered around the scene, then freely design layouts and arrange belongings however you like. Organize spaces to match your aesthetic and turn messy piles into neat, orderly arrangements. 

Deep Cleaning for Brand-New Tidy SpacesWipe away stains, dust and trash throughout every room, tackling grime in every hard-to-reach corner. Clear clutter and freshen spaces with your own hands, transforming shabby, messy rooms into spot-new interiors.

Fun Interactive Exploration & Hidden Tidying SurprisesDiscover plenty of interactive objects as you clean and organize. Whimsical tools hold subtle little details that spice up routine tidying, filling every cleaning and storage session with delightful unexpected treats. 

Game Features• Freely arrange and mix hundreds of items and furniture pieces

• Wide range of interactive props and objects with rich intricate details

• Slow-paced casual gameplay for peaceful, therapeutic tidying sessions
description_short: Declutterer is a tidying and storage simulation game. Take on commission requests from various clients, clear clutter and arrange items as required, and restore a spotless, tidy look to every space.
